taskDescription: Complete the crossword on the anatomy of the arm and cubital fossa.

words.clue: The strongest flexor of the elbow, lying deep to biceps brachii
The only extensor of the elbow joint, with three heads
Main artery of the arm that divides at the neck of the radius
Nerve compressed in Saturday night paralysis, running in the spiral groove
Triangular depression anterior to the elbow where venipuncture is performed
Bony point of the elbow where the triceps tendon inserts
The short head of biceps arises from the ___ process of the scapula
Biceps inserts into the radial ___ on the radius
Small muscle from coracoid process to mid-humerus that flexes and adducts the arm
